---
title: "About Me"
image: profilepic.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/leo-yu-0369042ba/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/men0456
---

Aspiring data scientist with a strong foundation in machine learning, deep learning, and natural language processing. Passionate about leveraging data to drive insights and solve complex problems. Experienced in Python programming, data analysis, and model development. Eager to contribute to innovative projects and collaborate with like-minded professionals in the field of data science.
